message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first SessionRestorer.restore in ft restart (tick 268)

Migrates the session-restore dispatch in `frankenterm/main.rs` to the
cx-first sibling `SessionRestorer::restore_with_cx`:

- L8388 call: `restorer.restore(&session, &checkpoint, wezterm)` →
  `restore_with_cx(&restore_cx, &session, &checkpoint, wezterm)`
  where `restore_cx` resolves via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`

The `_with_cx` variant on `SessionRestorer` threads Cx through every
layer of the restore pipeline: checkpoint load, wezterm restore layout
dispatch, scrollback injection, process relaunch. A cx-cancel during
`ft restart` now cleanly aborts the restore mid-flight rather than
completing the full layout replay + scrollback injection before
unwinding.

Legacy ambient `SessionRestorer::restore` is retained in
session_restore.rs for test harnesses.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 82 (187-268).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 128 sites (127 before + 1).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
